reviews.title: Great value and a huge room
reviews.text: The room is in apartment style, rather than a hotel style. It's great with the bathtub and kitchen and a nice view. It's set a bit further back from the sea than some other hotels, but only a short walk. There is no gym which is a real shame, they should have that in a building of this size and quality. The swimming pool also was broken and locked and could not use it. You can buy a pass for the FLC Hotel in front, but then they say you can only use the swimming pool, which is rather annoying that they should let you use the gym as well. Otherwise the location of this place is good and the quality of the room is fine

reviews.title: Beautiful room other than the tiny ants.
reviews.text:
The apartment was beautiful, the view was fantastic. The only problem I had was tiny ants. I would not have expected that on a 29th floor room. A spec of food was a problem,  they came from under the bathtub, sink and maybe the walls. The owner sprayed the second day and that helped some. But ants got into my tablet keyboard and even on my shoes by the door if there was a any food crumbs on the bottom. 
Other than that the room was great.

reviews.title: Nice big studio
reviews.text: This was a lovely bright studio apartment, which was a little run down, but comfortable.  Great value for money, and any extras we asked for were promptly provided. reviews.title: Surprisingly good
reviews.text:
After having booked the room, my girlfriend and I felt like we booked a scam, as there are many obviously fake reviews online about this place. So we weren‘t really expecting much. But we were surprised. We checked in and got a huge, new and clean room in the flc sea tower on the 22nd floor. The tv was a bit crooked, but that‘s it. We had a great time and liked quy nhon a lot. There are fantastic restaurants there. 
On a sidenote: Although advertised as a 5star hotel, it‘s not really a hotel, but much more just a room.  There’s not a hotel reception, but just a general flc sea tower reception. It should just be advertised as that and there would be nothing to complain about. All in all can recommend.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to submit your valuable review about our Apartment. We appreciate your comments about our customer service and upcoming improvements. Our staff is trained to provide the best service to our guests, we are glad you found the friendliness and value we bring during your stay here. We look forward to seeing you again for your upcoming trip to Quy Nhon!
Love
Mr.Huy, Customer Service Manager

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text: On my forth trip to Quy Nhon I wanted to check out an apartment rather than a hotel. Everything went smoothly, 10 minutes wait at reception,a very friendly and for Vietnam unusual,also very good English speaking showed me my apt. I just forgot to ask for an umbrella, so i got soaking wet the next morning. The fastest wifi i had so far in Vietnam!

reviews.title: Very good room for the price.
reviews.text: The room seems to be twice the size of the usual hotels I stay at. I chose a sea view room, and while the view is from the side, it is high enough that the view is really nice. It wasn't necessary, but the kitchen was well equipped, and the TV was a smart TV, which was great. Even though it's the off-season, I think other hotels in Quy Nhon will struggle because of *** FLC. However, I did notice some very small ants. I wonder if it's because of the kitchen... It seems you need to tightly wrap any food waste in plastic before disposing of it. The PP GYM nearby had a daily pass for 60,000 VND, and the Japanese and steak restaurants nearby were affordable and delicious, making for a great stay. GO Mart is also within walking distance.

reviews.title: An apartment that is good to come with family.
reviews.text:
The kitchen tools are well-equipped, allowing for simple cooking, and water, slippers, towels, and toothbrushes are all provided in sets of four. There are two double beds and a sofa bed, which means it can accommodate five families.

When the address is entered, a list of five places appears, including FLC hotels, and the condotel is the SEA TOWER, which is the building behind the hotel.

If you show the reservation status at the lobby on the first floor, they will call the owner for you.

The sea view is nice, and the underground passage leading to the beach is well-developed in front of the FLC hotel, making it convenient to access.

reviews.title: It's a condominium hotel, and you can check in with just the Agoda reservation document.
reviews.text:
I was worried because it mentioned that a Vietnamese phone number was required at check-in and that I should use the Vietnamese version of LINE, so I booked just one night. As it turned out, there were no issues at all. First, I showed the Agoda reservation voucher at the reception of the condotel located behind the hotel building and waited a bit. Then, a friendly young man came and guided me to my room, explaining how to use the facilities, and that concluded the check-in process. 

Since the room was fine, I went ahead and extended my stay through Agoda, and I had the young man confirm it for me. Although it was the lowest-priced room, it was located on the 19th floor of a 30-story building, with a nice view of the sea diagonally in front, which was great. There was no crowding in the elevator, but it was unfortunate that there were times when the water in the bathtub wasn't hot. 

The area where this condotel is located appears to be a newly developed region, with buildings under construction, and the beach was narrower compared to the old town. There are also fewer crowded areas, so some people might find it lacking. Additionally, the railway station in the old town is hardly used, so when coming by train, be careful as you'll need to take a taxi from Diutri Station, which is about 10 kilometers away.

reviews.title: Review for a 4-night stay at FLC.
reviews.text: This is the FLC apartment; when checking in, you need to call the staff as mentioned in the booking email. The reception desk doesn't handle it. The room is clean, has a balcony, so it is very airy and doesn't even need air conditioning. The room manager is very enthusiastic. The downside is that on the last day I was there, at 8 AM, FLC cut off the electricity for the entire building, so I had to pack my things and go to the beach early to wait for the car to pick me up. I stayed in room 2112, which does not look like the pictures; it is simpler and not vintage like in the photos. Putting this aside, I still enjoyed my stay because the room was clean and airy, suitable for families as it has 2 beds, a washing machine, and a kitchen for cooking.

reviews.title: Modern studio, close to the beach
reviews.text:
Very nice and clean studio, with large beds, good size balcony, and all the other furniture you need. High floor, ok view (sea view is a side view, not direct view). 

Very limited kitchen utensils though, if you plan on cooking. We had to ask for more stuff. A pity the pool in the building is not free, but 50K per person is fine. Also, no cleaning service is included (helpful for longer stays like ours).

Staff was very friendly and helpful, on all fronts.

Great location, with many eateries around, a very efficient and affordable laundry place close by and some bars with great energy. The hotel staff were attentive and super helpful, made sure me and my group were catered for. 
Room was large and had many amenities, with some of the best aircon I have had since being in Vietnam. Highly recommend this place to others as its great value for money.

reviews.title: CHOOSE NOW
reviews.text:
When checking in, I was truly surprised. Because with such a low room rate, I got a room like a 5-star hotel.
1. Quite spacious, around 45-50m2.
2. Fully equipped: kitchen, dishes, fridge, dining table, sofa, TV, washing machine... The bathroom is complete with towels, toothbrushes, shampoo, and especially has a bathtub.
3. Really clean, very clean.
4. Large bed, comfortable mattress.
5. There is a balcony overlooking the mountains and the sea. The building's location is in the center, convenient for walking to the beach and dining.
A 5-star standard, a 5-star hotel might not be like this.

reviews.title: It's convenient for outdoor activities since it's also close to the beach.
reviews.text: One of the biggest advantages of this apartment is that you can step onto the smooth golden sandy beach in just a few steps. This brings maximum convenience for those who love outdoor activities such as swimming, jogging on the beach, and water sports. I often go to the beach every morning to do yoga in the early morning sunlight, breathe in the fresh air, and listen to the sound of the waves, which makes me feel very refreshed and relaxed. Additionally, I can easily organize BBQ parties with friends at the beach to create memorable moments.

reviews.title: Modern interiors, delicate layouts, space optimization.
reviews.text: The interior of the apartment is finished in a modern style with meticulous attention to detail. From the wooden floors to the lighting, sofa, bed, and dining table, every piece of furniture has been carefully chosen, showcasing a high aesthetic sense. The layout of the apartment is also very efficient, featuring open spaces that maximize natural light and pleasant sea breezes. The kitchen area is equipped with the latest cooking appliances, including an induction cooker, oven, and range hood, providing favorable conditions for those who wish to cook for themselves. The design of the bathroom is also very luxurious, featuring comfortable showers and bathtubs, allowing for a relaxed experience akin to that of a five-star hotel.

reviews.title: Quy Nhon lately is so lovely, the beach is chill.
reviews.text: Quy Nhon is becoming more beautiful and developed; compared to a few years ago when I visited for tourism, I can see the changes happening very quickly now. I have supported the apartment here since the beginning, and now I see it looking better and better. Prices haven't increased much, but the service is getting better. When I first visited, I mentioned that the blankets didn't smell good. Now, booking again, the blankets smell nice and have a very pleasant scent. This shows that they know how to listen to customers. I sincerely wish you all continued growth!

The view wasn't too spectacular but the room was very beautiful, the bathroom was clean in every corner and had a relaxing bathtub. What I liked the most was the linens here, they were soft and had a light relaxing scent. There was also a swimming pool in the building I stayed in, and the pool was quite beautiful.

reviews.title: The staff is enthusiastic, the view is beautiful, recommend.
reviews.text: Satisfied with the room and the service of the staff. This place is not only beautiful but also conveniently located for everything, with a great view of the sea, easy access to transportation, and dining options. There is also a swimming pool and entertainment area right in the building, truly excellent.

reviews.title: The room is cheap, spacious, and the price is okay, but the parking fee is too high.
reviews.text: Our room for 2 people is about 45m2, with a sea view. The room is of good quality, very clean, and spacious. There is even a washing machine. However, when I went there, it was peak tourist season, so the elevator was super crowded, and it took a long time and was a bit tiring to wait for it. The second drawback is that the parking garage of the building charges very high fees. Since I drove a car, I parked it in the garage, and the fee from 9:30 PM to 6:00 AM the next morning is 100,000 VND, and I stayed for 3 additional hours, so it totaled 115,000 VND for less than a day of parking. I find this to be the most inconvenient thing; motorcycle parking also charges by the hour. Other than that, everything else is okay, nothing to complain about ❤️.

reviews.title: The room is very good.
reviews.text:
We were two people and experienced a 1-day, 1-night stay as follows:
- Staff: very friendly and supportive, I asked to drop off my luggage early at 12 PM, and they let me check in my room right away without having to wait until 2 PM (note: if there are no rooms available, you can leave your luggage with them).
- View: I booked a sea view room and it was just right, very chill, with a bar chair on the balcony to enjoy the sea view, and there are bar chairs for guests who smoke like me.
- Location: right in the center, you can take a stroll to the beach which is quite close, and there are many shops in the hotel lobby which is very convenient.
Room quality: 2 spacious double beds, a sofa, bath towels, air conditioning, TV, wardrobe, dishes, and an electric stove for cooking; those traveling with family can buy seafood from the market to cook and eat… it matched the description on Agoda perfectly.
Price: 450-500k (quite reasonable for the quality).
Overall: 5 stars.
